note: Bot offline 15.0 days — zero trades generated today. 15-DAY threshold crossed this run.

anomalies.detail: Bot has been offline since ~2026-04-23. The 15-day (360h) milestone is crossed as of this run. All learning systems are deeply stalled. Every additional hour deepens the A/B graduation backlog.
anomalies.escalation: URGENT — 82 A/B rules at conf>=75% cannot graduate. 98 active rules total at treatment_wr=null. Critical learning paralysis.

anomalies.value: 82 high-confidence (>=75%) A/B rules frozen — treatment_wr=null for all
anomalies.detail: Top-confidence rules unable to graduate: BB_solo_signal_boost (95%), ETH_SHORT_BB_golden (95%), streak_momentum_gate (90%), BTC_BUY_BB_golden (91%), TIGHT_TP_preference (90%). All proven by historical analysis but cannot be confirmed or rejected without live trade data.

anomalies.value: SOL_SHORT_edge_promote (90% conf) SUSPENDED for live contradiction — but it's the #1 historical alpha (+$5807, 63.7% WR)
anomalies.detail: SOL_SHORT_edge_promote and SOL_SHORT_priority_boost (76%) are both SUSPENDED_LIVE_CONTRADICTION. Historically SOL_SHORT is the best-performing setup. The live contradiction suspended it. RULE_CONFLICT_SOL_SHORT (92%) blocks further probe. Need: human decision on whether to allow controlled reversal probe at 50% gate size.
anomalies.action_required: Human decision: (A) unblock SOL_SHORT for controlled probe at 50% gate, or (B) maintain full block and accept losing the #1 historical alpha source

anomalies.detail: 4 consecutive losses at shutdown. Circuit breaker threshold is 5. Soft-start protocol required on restart.

anomalies.value: 8/8 runtime graduated rules — times_correct=0 for all
anomalies.detail: All 8 runtime rules in data/llm/graduated_rules.json have times_correct=0. Outcome callback wiring unverified. Must monitor first 5 closed trades after restart.

anomalies.value: confidence_60_70_sweet_spot (93%) says range is +EV; conf_floor_70_v1 (87%) penalizes it -20pts
anomalies.detail: SUSPENDED rule confidence_60_70_sweet_spot (93%) states conf 60-70% = +$2.19 avg. Runtime rule conf_floor_70_v1 says 46.3% WR / -$2321 total — and penalizes -20pts. These are the same confidence range but opposite conclusions. Dataset size difference or time-window split may explain; needs investigation post-restart.

anomalies.value: llm_regime column empty in trades.csv — 12 regime A/B rules unmeasurable
anomalies.detail: Even when the bot restarts, regime-based A/B rules cannot be measured unless the llm_regime column is written to trades.csv at trade close.
ETH_SHORT+trending+morning edge data (80% WR) is 52.8h stale. Historical pattern still valid but needs live confirmation post-restart.
